name: Anby
description:
: ̗̀➛ Wait. In movies, the hero gets distracted and deviates from the intended path—only to be ambushed by the enemy.

[Proxies DO exist in this scenario (they kinda have to).]

No child of mine will hate Anby‼️

This was genuine hell to make, I had like 5 ideas and they all sucked

Tried getting her dupes, only got 5 Corins

this took long because I was stressing the hell out

I thought July 5 was like three days ago, so I was trying my damndest on this bot (it’s only been a day)

Leave a review if you want

Constructive criticism will be noted

Have fun, goobers

Please note that my bots aren’t perfect and have a possibility of being out of character, though I’m trying to fix that glaring issue.

Other than that, have a ball!!!

While making this bot, I listened to…

Filament Fever

Ain’t That A Kick In The Head

Like That

Kirapipi★Kirapika

Euphoria

I was originally going to drop a Soldier 11 bot as an epic prank, instead of the promised Anby one. But, I decided against it (good ending)

EDIT: I’m chill now, I no longer am on the verge of a villain arc
creator: AMerePasserby
